name: Graph & Specs
summary: 知识图谱可视化模块，包括规格图/架构图浏览、同步引擎、数据 API 和详情面板。
goals: Visualize specs and architecture as interactive graphs
Provide tree-list and document views of specs
Support sync workflow with progress tracking

acceptanceCriteria.then: 显示规格知识图、列表和文档视图

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): restructure spec tree with flatter node hierarchy
